listing-1.label: Listing 1
listing-1.description: Colorful Peppa Pig cruise ship playset includes three character figures and various beach-themed accessories. Plastic ship has multiple levels, bunk beds, and a fold-out side panel revealing a ball pit scene. Set comes with a slide, lounge chairs, a table, and a pool.
listing-1.hint: Good — detailed text and a real seller photo

listing-3.label: Listing 3
listing-3.description: Condition: Used - Good. Age Range: All ages. Its available don't ask or will be ignored and make your offer amount $ and time you want to pick up. Best offer gets it. No food or box toys included. No trays that were inside are gone!! Really cute toy. Please refer to actual item photo for reference. Sizing is about a foot tall, not life size don't ask if human size it's not!! Dimensions: Measures approximately 18" (H) x 13.5" (W) x 6.5" (D).
listing-3.hint: Avoid — missing accessories and best-offer hassle

listing-4.hint: Not sure — promising, but confirm price and lights
